summary: Risk Engine v3 Coach Dashboard + School Pod testing complete. All 19 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified - Coach Dashboard shows Top Priority card with CRITICAL severity label, ↘Improving trajectory indicator, whyNow text, coach-specific CTAs (Open Pod for review intervention). School Pod Risk component displays primaryRisk, severity, trajectory, whyNow, recommended action, and 'Also watching' secondary risks. No riskScore/confidence exposed in UI. Coach escalation creates entries visible in Director Inbox. Director view continues working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Coach inbox correctly filters out 'monitor' intervention items (coach sees only actionable)
Coach inbox properly scoped to coach's assigned athletes only
CTA labels match intervention type: review→'Open Pod', escalate→'Request director help'
School Pod Risk component displays all required v3 fields without riskScore/confidence
Escalation flow creates entry in director_actions collection visible in Director Inbox
Coach inbox items sorted by riskScore descending
Secondary risks properly shown in 'Also watching' section (up to 2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Risk Engine v3 Coach Dashboard + School Pod fully implemented and tested. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_coach_inbox_risk_v3.py covers: (1) Coach inbox returns 200 with v3 fields, (2) Filters out monitor intervention, (3) Scoped to coach's athletes, (4) CTA labels match intervention type, (5) Sorted by riskScore, (6) School pod risk endpoint returns all fields, (7) Coach escalation creates director action. Frontend test IDs: coach-inbox-section, coach-top-priority, coach-severity-label, coach-why-now, coach-top-priority-cta, coach-needs-attention, coach-inbox-row-{id}, coach-cta-{id}, school-pod-risk, pod-risk-severity, pod-risk-primary, pod-risk-why-now, pod-risk-action, pod-trajectory-{trajectory}, escalate-modal, escalate-note-input, escalate-confirm-btn.
